ai_response: Doing well, thanks for asking. How are you today?

key_fetch_endpoints.name: syncRecordValuesSpaceInitial
key_fetch_endpoints.purpose: Notion internal record sync - fetches updated block state after AI response

findings.ai_communication_flow: WebSocket-only. User prompt sent through existing primus WebSocket → server processes → AI response delivered back via WebSocket messages → client receives and renders. syncRecordValuesSpaceInitial calls happen AFTER response to sync updated record state (Notion's CRDT-based data model).
findings.no_dedicated_ai_api: Unlike other AI services (ChatGPT uses SSE, Claude uses SSE), Notion AI chat uses the same WebSocket connection that powers all real-time collaboration features. There is NO separate HTTP endpoint for AI chat.
findings.websocket_persistence: WebSocket connection (primus-v8) is established on page load and persists. No new WebSocket connections made per prompt — all AI communication reuses the existing connection.
findings.tls_interception_note: Previous test (#026 request) noted etap detect=0 for TLS interception. The WebSocket uses wss:// to msgstore-001.www.notion.so which may use different TLS handling than www.notion.so API calls.

apf_implication.blocking_feasibility: DIFFICULT - WebSocket-based protocols cannot be easily intercepted with HTTP response injection. Standard H2 block response approach (is_http2=2 + END_STREAM) works for HTTP requests but NOT for WebSocket frames.
apf_implication.warning_feasibility: VERY_DIFFICULT - Warning delivery via WebSocket requires either: (1) intercepting and modifying WebSocket frames (binary/text), (2) injecting a separate HTTP response before WebSocket upgrade, or (3) blocking the WebSocket upgrade itself and returning HTTP error with warning content.
apf_implication.recommended_approach: Block at WebSocket upgrade (HTTP 101 Switching Protocols) stage — return HTTP error response with warning HTML instead of completing the upgrade. Alternative: block the domain at DNS/TLS level. The syncRecordValuesSpaceInitial H2 endpoint could potentially be used for warning injection but would only affect record sync, not the chat flow directly.
apf_implication.key_challenge: msgstore-001.www.notion.so WebSocket server is separate from www.notion.so API server — may need separate APF rule for the msgstore subdomain.
